rationale: Educ. Code §7.104 governs board member terms and vacancies. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 7.104. TERMS. (a) At each general election immediately following a decennial reapportionment of districts, one member shall be elected to the board from each district.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict detected.
